title: First-Line Supervisors of Housekeeping and Janitorial Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate work activities of cleaning personnel in hotels, hospitals, offices, and other establishments.

tasks.text: Supervise in-house services, such as laundries, maintenance and repair, dry cleaning, or valet services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select the most suitable cleaning materials for different types of linens, furniture, flooring, and surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise managers, desk clerks, or admitting personnel of rooms ready for occupancy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect work performed to ensure that it meets specifications and established standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform or assist with cleaning duties as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and prepare employee work schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and implement operational standards and procedures for the departments supervised.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and evaluate the physical condition of facilities to determine the type of work required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inventory stock to ensure that supplies and equipment are available in adequate amounts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue supplies and equipment to workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Forecast necessary levels of staffing and stock at different times to facilitate effective scheduling and ordering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check and maintain equipment to ensure that it is in working order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain required records of work hours, budgets, payrolls, and other information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Direct activities for stopping the spread of infections in facilities, such as hospitals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or arrange for additional services, such as painting, repair work, renovations, and the replacement of furnishings and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities with other departments to ensure that services are provided in an efficient and timely manner.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate complaints about service and equipment, and take corrective action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct staff in work policies and procedures, and the use and maintenance of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and order or purchase new equipment, supplies, or furnishings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on activity, personnel, and information, such as occupancy, hours worked, facility usage, work performed, and departmental expenses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with staff to resolve performance and personnel problems, and to discuss company policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate employee performance and recommend personnel actions, such as promotions, transfers, and dismissals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend changes that could improve service and increase operational efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform financial tasks, such as estimating costs and preparing and managing budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Screen job applicants, and hire new employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform grounds maintenance tasks, such as removing snow and mowing the lawn.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
